title: Camerium trispermum
taxonomy: Camerium trispermum is a species within the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the staff tree or spindletree family. This plant is native to South America. The exact classification of Camerium trispermum is Camerium trispermum, a genus within the Celastraceae family. Further classification includes the family Celastraceae, order Celastrales, and class Magnoliopsida. Camerium trispermum's classification provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
